166	    def _prepare_generation_config(self, request_config: RequestConfig) -> Dict[str, Any]:
167	        kwargs = {'max_new_tokens': request_config.max_tokens}
168	        for key in ['temperature', 'top_k', 'top_p', 'repetition_penalty']:
169	            new_value = getattr(request_config, key)
170	            if new_value is None:
171	                kwargs[key] = self.generation_config.get(key)
172	            else:
173	                kwargs[key] = new_value
174	        for key in ['n', 'frequency_penalty', 'presence_penalty']:
175	            kwargs[key] = getattr(request_config, key)
176	
177	        return kwargs
178	
179	    def _add_stop_words(self, generation_config: Dict[str, Any], request_config: RequestConfig) -> None:
180	        template_meta = self.template.template_meta
181	        stop_words = (request_config.stop or []) + (self.generation_config.get('stop') or []) + template_meta.stop_words
182	        generation_config['stop_token_ids'] = self._get_stop_token_ids(stop_words)
183	
184	    def _create_chat_completion_response(self, output, inputs, return_details: bool = False):
185	        assert output is not None
186	        meta_info = output['meta_info']
187	        usage_info = self._get_usage_info(meta_info['prompt_tokens'], meta_info['completion_tokens'])
188	        response = self.template.decode_generate_ids(output['output_ids'], template_inputs=inputs['template_inputs'])
189	        toolcall = self._get_toolcall(response)
190	        token_ids = output['output_ids'] if return_details else None
191	        choice = ChatCompletionResponseChoice(
192	            index=0,
193	            message=ChatMessage(role='assistant', content=response, tool_calls=toolcall),
194	            finish_reason=meta_info['finish_reason']['type'],
195	            logprobs=None,
196	            token_ids=token_ids)
197	        prompt_token_ids = None
198	        images_size = None
199	        if return_details:
200	            prompt_token_ids = output.get('prompt_token_ids')
201	            images = inputs['template_inputs'].images
202	            if all(isinstance(image, Image.Image) for image in images):
203	                images_size = [image.size for image in images]
204	        return ChatCompletionResponse(
205	            model=self.model_name,
206	            choices=[choice],
207	            usage=usage_info,
208	            id=random_uuid(),
209	            prompt_token_ids=prompt_token_ids,
210	            images_size=images_size)
211	
212	    def infer(
213	        self,
214	        infer_requests: List[InferRequest],
215	        request_config: Optional[RequestConfig] = None,
216	        metrics: Optional[List[Metric]] = None,
217	        *,
218	        use_tqdm: Optional[bool] = None,
219	    ) -> List[Union[ChatCompletionResponse, Iterator[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]]]:
220	        return super().infer(infer_requests, request_config, metrics, use_tqdm=use_tqdm)
221	
222	    async def infer_async(self,
223	                          infer_request: InferRequest,
224	                          request_config: Optional[RequestConfig] = None,
225	                          *,
226	                          pre_infer_hook=None,
227	                          **kwargs) -> Union[ChatCompletionResponse, AsyncIterator[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]]:
228	        request_config = deepcopy(request_config or RequestConfig())
229	        self.template.set_mode('sglang')
230	        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
231	        with torch.inference_mode():
232	            inputs = await loop.run_in_executor(None, self.template.encode, infer_request, True)
233	        if self.task_type == 'embedding':
234	            inputs.pop('length', None)
235	        self.set_default_max_tokens(request_config, inputs)
236	        generation_config = self._prepare_generation_config(request_config)
237	        self._add_stop_words(generation_config, request_config)
238	        kwargs.update({'inputs': inputs, 'generation_config': generation_config, 'request_config': request_config})
239	        if pre_infer_hook:
240	            kwargs = pre_infer_hook(kwargs)
241	        if request_config.stream:
242	            return self._infer_stream_async(**kwargs)
243	        elif self.task_type == 'embedding':
244	            kwargs.pop('generation_config', None)
245	            return await self._infer_embedding_async(**kwargs)
246	        else:
247	            return await self._infer_full_async(**kwargs)
248	
249	    async def _infer_embedding_async(self, inputs: Dict[str, Any], **kwargs) -> EmbeddingResponse:
250	        from sglang.srt.managers.io_struct import EmbeddingReqInput
251	        obj = EmbeddingReqInput(
252	            input_ids=inputs['input_ids'], image_data=inputs.get('images'), audio_data=inputs.get('audios'))
253	        generator = self.engine.tokenizer_manager.generate_request(obj, None)
254	        output = await generator.__anext__()
255	        usage_info = self._get_usage_info(output['meta_info']['prompt_tokens'], 0)
256	        return EmbeddingResponse(
257	            model=self.model_name,
258	            data=[EmbeddingResponseData(embedding=output['embedding'])],
259	            usage=usage_info,
260	            id=random_uuid())
261	
262	    async def _infer_full_async(self, inputs: Dict[str, Any], generation_config: Dict[str, Any],
263	                                request_config: RequestConfig) -> ChatCompletionResponse:
264	        engine_inputs = {k: v for k, v in inputs.items() if k != 'template_inputs'}
265	        output = await self.engine.async_generate(**engine_inputs, sampling_params=generation_config)
266	        output['prompt_token_ids'] = inputs['input_ids']
267	        return self._create_chat_completion_response(output, inputs, request_config.return_details)
268	
269	    async def _infer_stream_async(self, inputs: Dict[str, Any], generation_config: Dict[str, Any],
270	                                  **kwargs) -> AsyncIterator[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]:
271	        engine_inputs = {k: v for k, v in inputs.items() if k != 'template_inputs'}
272	        result_generator = await self.engine.async_generate(
273	            **engine_inputs, sampling_params=generation_config, stream=True)
274	        infer_streamer = InferStreamer(self.template, template_inputs=inputs['template_inputs'])
275	        async for output in result_generator:
276	            res = self._create_chat_completion_stream_response(output, infer_streamer)
277	            if res is None:
278	                continue
279	            yield res
280	
281	    def _create_chat_completion_stream_response(self, output, infer_streamer) -> Optional[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]:
282	        assert output is not None
283	        meta_info = output['meta_info']
284	        finish_reason = meta_info['finish_reason']
285	        is_finished = finish_reason is not None
286	        delta_text = infer_streamer.get_printable_text(output['output_ids'], is_finished)
287	        if not delta_text and not is_finished:
288	            return
289	        toolcall = None
290	        if is_finished:
291	            finish_reason = finish_reason['type']
292	            toolcall = self._get_toolcall(
293	                self.template.decode_generate_ids(output['output_ids'], **infer_streamer.decode_kwargs))
294	        meta_info = output['meta_info']
295	        usage_info = self._get_usage_info(meta_info['prompt_tokens'], meta_info['completion_tokens'])
296	        # TODO: logprobs
297	        choice = ChatCompletionResponseStreamChoice(
298	            index=0,
299	            delta=DeltaMessage(role='assistant', content=delta_text, tool_calls=toolcall),
300	            finish_reason=finish_reason,
301	            logprobs=None)
302	        return ChatCompletionStreamResponse(model=self.model_name, choices=[choice], usage=usage_info)
303

file.content:
# Copyright (c) ModelScope Contributors. All rights reserved.
import asyncio
import inspect
import os
import sglang as sgl
import torch
from copy import deepcopy
from PIL import Image
from sglang.srt.sampling.sampling_params import SamplingParams
from sglang.srt.server_args import ServerArgs
from transformers import GenerationConfig
from typing import Any, AsyncIterator, Dict, Iterator, List, Optional, Union

from swift.metrics import Metric
from swift.model import get_processor
from swift.template import Template
from swift.utils import get_logger, safe_snapshot_download
from .infer_engine import InferEngine
from .protocol import (ChatCompletionResponse, ChatCompletionResponseChoice, ChatCompletionResponseStreamChoice,
                       ChatCompletionStreamResponse, ChatMessage, DeltaMessage, EmbeddingResponse,
                       EmbeddingResponseData, InferRequest, RequestConfig, random_uuid)
from .utils import InferStreamer

logger = get_logger()


class SglangEngine(InferEngine):

    def __init__(
        self,
        model_id_or_path: str,
        *,
        template: Optional[Template] = None,
        torch_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,
        model_type: Optional[str] = None,
        template_type: Optional[str] = None,
        use_hf: Optional[bool] = None,
        hub_token: Optional[str] = None,
        revision: Optional[str] = None,
        # engine kwargs
        tp_size: int = 1,
        pp_size: int = 1,
        dp_size: int = 1,
        ep_size: int = 1,
        enable_ep_moe: bool = False,
        mem_fraction_static: Optional[float] = None,
        context_length: Optional[int] = None,
        disable_cuda_graph: bool = False,
        quantization: Optional[str] = None,
        task_type: Optional[str] = None,
        kv_cache_dtype: str = 'auto',
        enable_dp_attention: bool = False,
        disable_custom_all_reduce: bool = True,
        speculative_algorithm: Optional[str] = None,
        speculative_num_steps: Optional[int] = None,
        speculative_eagle_topk: Optional[int] = None,
        speculative_num_draft_tokens: Optional[int] = None,
        log_level='error',
        engine_kwargs: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
    ):
        self.model_id_or_path = model_id_or_path
        self.torch_dtype = torch_dtype
        self.model_type = model_type
        self.use_hf = use_hf
        self.hub_token = hub_token
        self.revision = revision
        self.tp_size = tp_size
        self.pp_size = pp_size
        self.dp_size = dp_size
        self.ep_size = ep_size
        self.enable_ep_moe = enable_ep_moe
        self.mem_fraction_static = mem_fraction_static
        self.context_length = context_length
        self.disable_cuda_graph = disable_cuda_graph
        self.quantization = quantization
        self.task_type = task_type
        self.kv_cache_dtype = kv_cache_dtype
        self.enable_dp_attention = enable_dp_attention
        self.disable_custom_all_reduce = disable_custom_all_reduce
        self.speculative_algorithm = speculative_algorithm
        self.speculative_num_steps = speculative_num_steps
        self.speculative_eagle_topk = speculative_eagle_topk
        self.speculative_num_draft_tokens = speculative_num_draft_tokens
        self.log_level = log_level
        if template is None:
            processor = self._get_processor()
            template = self._get_template(processor, template_type=template_type)
        else:
            safe_snapshot_download(
                model_id_or_path,
                revision=revision,
                download_model=True,
                use_hf=use_hf,
                ignore_patterns=getattr(template.model_meta, 'ignore_patterns', None),
                hub_token=hub_token)
        super().__init__(template)
        self._prepare_server_args(engine_kwargs)
        self.engine = sgl.Engine(server_args=self.server_args)
        self._load_generation_config()
        if speculative_num_draft_tokens is not None:
            self.max_tokens_offset = -speculative_num_draft_tokens

    def _get_processor(self):
        return get_processor(
            model_id_or_path=self.model_id_or_path,
            torch_dtype=self.torch_dtype,
            download_model=True,
            model_type=self.model_type,
            use_hf=self.use_hf,
            hub_token=self.hub_token,
            revision=self.revision,
            task_type=self.task_type)

    def _prepare_server_args(self, engine_kwargs):
        if engine_kwargs is None:
            engine_kwargs = {}
        if self.context_length is not None:
            self.max_model_len = self.context_length
            logger.info(f'Setting max_model_len: {self.context_length}')
        if self.max_model_len is not None:
            self.max_model_len -= 1
        parameters = inspect.signature(ServerArgs).parameters
        if 'pp_size' in parameters:
            engine_kwargs['pp_size'] = self.pp_size
        if 'enable_ep_moe' in parameters:
            engine_kwargs['enable_ep_moe'] = self.enable_ep_moe
        self.server_args = ServerArgs(
            model_path=self.model_dir,
            dtype=self.model_info.torch_dtype,
            tp_size=self.tp_size,
            dp_size=self.dp_size,
            ep_size=self.ep_size,
            mem_fraction_static=self.mem_fraction_static,
            context_length=self.context_length,
            disable_cuda_graph=self.disable_cuda_graph,
            quantization=self.quantization,
            kv_cache_dtype=self.kv_cache_dtype,
            enable_dp_attention=self.enable_dp_attention,
            disable_custom_all_reduce=self.disable_custom_all_reduce,
            speculative_algorithm=self.speculative_algorithm,
            speculative_num_steps=self.speculative_num_steps,
            speculative_eagle_topk=self.speculative_eagle_topk,
            speculative_num_draft_tokens=self.speculative_num_draft_tokens,
            log_level=self.log_level,
            skip_tokenizer_init=True,
            trust_remote_code=True,
            **engine_kwargs,
        )
        if self.task_type == 'embedding':
            self.server_args.is_embedding = True

    def _load_generation_config(self) -> None:
        generation_config_path = os.path.join(self.model_dir, 'generation_config.json')
        if os.path.isfile(generation_config_path):
            generation_config = GenerationConfig.from_pretrained(self.model_dir)
        else:
            generation_config = GenerationConfig()
        kwargs = generation_config.to_dict()
        top_k = kwargs.get('top_k')
        if top_k == 0:
            kwargs['top_k'] = -1

        parameters = inspect.signature(SamplingParams).parameters
        self.generation_config = {k: v for k, v in kwargs.items() if k in parameters and v is not None}

    def _prepare_generation_config(self, request_config: RequestConfig) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        kwargs = {'max_new_tokens': request_config.max_tokens}
        for key in ['temperature', 'top_k', 'top_p', 'repetition_penalty']:
            new_value = getattr(request_config, key)
            if new_value is None:
                kwargs[key] = self.generation_config.get(key)
            else:
                kwargs[key] = new_value
        for key in ['n', 'frequency_penalty', 'presence_penalty']:
            kwargs[key] = getattr(request_config, key)

        return kwargs

    def _add_stop_words(self, generation_config: Dict[str, Any], request_config: RequestConfig) -> None:
        template_meta = self.template.template_meta
        stop_words = (request_config.stop or []) + (self.generation_config.get('stop') or []) + template_meta.stop_words
        generation_config['stop_token_ids'] = self._get_stop_token_ids(stop_words)

    def _create_chat_completion_response(self, output, inputs, return_details: bool = False):
        assert output is not None
        meta_info = output['meta_info']
        usage_info = self._get_usage_info(meta_info['prompt_tokens'], meta_info['completion_tokens'])
        response = self.template.decode_generate_ids(output['output_ids'], template_inputs=inputs['template_inputs'])
        toolcall = self._get_toolcall(response)
        token_ids = output['output_ids'] if return_details else None
        choice = ChatCompletionResponseChoice(
            index=0,
            message=ChatMessage(role='assistant', content=response, tool_calls=toolcall),
            finish_reason=meta_info['finish_reason']['type'],
            logprobs=None,
            token_ids=token_ids)
        prompt_token_ids = None
        images_size = None
        if return_details:
            prompt_token_ids = output.get('prompt_token_ids')
            images = inputs['template_inputs'].images
            if all(isinstance(image, Image.Image) for image in images):
                images_size = [image.size for image in images]
        return ChatCompletionResponse(
            model=self.model_name,
            choices=[choice],
            usage=usage_info,
            id=random_uuid(),
            prompt_token_ids=prompt_token_ids,
            images_size=images_size)

    def infer(
        self,
        infer_requests: List[InferRequest],
        request_config: Optional[RequestConfig] = None,
        metrics: Optional[List[Metric]] = None,
        *,
        use_tqdm: Optional[bool] = None,
    ) -> List[Union[ChatCompletionResponse, Iterator[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]]]:
        return super().infer(infer_requests, request_config, metrics, use_tqdm=use_tqdm)

    async def infer_async(self,
                          infer_request: InferRequest,
                          request_config: Optional[RequestConfig] = None,
                          *,
                          pre_infer_hook=None,
                          **kwargs) -> Union[ChatCompletionResponse, AsyncIterator[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]]:
        request_config = deepcopy(request_config or RequestConfig())
        self.template.set_mode('sglang')
        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
        with torch.inference_mode():
            inputs = await loop.run_in_executor(None, self.template.encode, infer_request, True)
        if self.task_type == 'embedding':
            inputs.pop('length', None)
        self.set_default_max_tokens(request_config, inputs)
        generation_config = self._prepare_generation_config(request_config)
        self._add_stop_words(generation_config, request_config)
        kwargs.update({'inputs': inputs, 'generation_config': generation_config, 'request_config': request_config})
        if pre_infer_hook:
            kwargs = pre_infer_hook(kwargs)
        if request_config.stream:
            return self._infer_stream_async(**kwargs)
        elif self.task_type == 'embedding':
            kwargs.pop('generation_config', None)
            return await self._infer_embedding_async(**kwargs)
        else:
            return await self._infer_full_async(**kwargs)

    async def _infer_embedding_async(self, inputs: Dict[str, Any], **kwargs) -> EmbeddingResponse:
        from sglang.srt.managers.io_struct import EmbeddingReqInput
        obj = EmbeddingReqInput(
            input_ids=inputs['input_ids'], image_data=inputs.get('images'), audio_data=inputs.get('audios'))
        generator = self.engine.tokenizer_manager.generate_request(obj, None)
        output = await generator.__anext__()
        usage_info = self._get_usage_info(output['meta_info']['prompt_tokens'], 0)
        return EmbeddingResponse(
            model=self.model_name,
            data=[EmbeddingResponseData(embedding=output['embedding'])],
            usage=usage_info,
            id=random_uuid())

    async def _infer_full_async(self, inputs: Dict[str, Any], generation_config: Dict[str, Any],
                                request_config: RequestConfig) -> ChatCompletionResponse:
        engine_inputs = {k: v for k, v in inputs.items() if k != 'template_inputs'}
        output = await self.engine.async_generate(**engine_inputs, sampling_params=generation_config)
        output['prompt_token_ids'] = inputs['input_ids']
        return self._create_chat_completion_response(output, inputs, request_config.return_details)

    async def _infer_stream_async(self, inputs: Dict[str, Any], generation_config: Dict[str, Any],
                                  **kwargs) -> AsyncIterator[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]:
        engine_inputs = {k: v for k, v in inputs.items() if k != 'template_inputs'}
        result_generator = await self.engine.async_generate(
            **engine_inputs, sampling_params=generation_config, stream=True)
        infer_streamer = InferStreamer(self.template, template_inputs=inputs['template_inputs'])
        async for output in result_generator:
            res = self._create_chat_completion_stream_response(output, infer_streamer)
            if res is None:
                continue
            yield res

    def _create_chat_completion_stream_response(self, output, infer_streamer) -> Optional[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]:
        assert output is not None
        meta_info = output['meta_info']
        finish_reason = meta_info['finish_reason']
        is_finished = finish_reason is not None
        delta_text = infer_streamer.get_printable_text(output['output_ids'], is_finished)
        if not delta_text and not is_finished:
            return
        toolcall = None
        if is_finished:
            finish_reason = finish_reason['type']
            toolcall = self._get_toolcall(
                self.template.decode_generate_ids(output['output_ids'], **infer_streamer.decode_kwargs))
        meta_info = output['meta_info']
        usage_info = self._get_usage_info(meta_info['prompt_tokens'], meta_info['completion_tokens'])
        # TODO: logprobs
        choice = ChatCompletionResponseStreamChoice(
            index=0,
            delta=DeltaMessage(role='assistant', content=delta_text, tool_calls=toolcall),
            finish_reason=finish_reason,
            logprobs=None)
        return ChatCompletionStreamResponse(model=self.model_name, choices=[choice], usage=usage_info)

from typing import TYPE_CHECKING

from swift.utils.import_utils import _LazyModule

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from .base import BaseInferEngine
    from .grpo_vllm_engine import GRPOVllmEngine
    from .infer_client import InferClient
    from .infer_engine import InferEngine
    from .lmdeploy_engine import LmdeployEngine
    from .protocol import ChatCompletionResponse, Function, InferRequest, RequestConfig
    from .sglang_engine import SglangEngine
    from .transformers_engine import TransformersEngine
    from .utils import AdapterRequest, patch_vllm_memory_leak, prepare_generation_config
    from .vllm_engine import VllmEngine
else:
    _import_structure = {
        'vllm_engine': ['VllmEngine'],
        'grpo_vllm_engine': ['GRPOVllmEngine'],
        'lmdeploy_engine': ['LmdeployEngine'],
        'sglang_engine': ['SglangEngine'],
        'transformers_engine': ['TransformersEngine'],
        'infer_client': ['InferClient'],
        'infer_engine': ['InferEngine'],
        'base': ['BaseInferEngine'],
        'utils': ['prepare_generation_config', 'AdapterRequest', 'patch_vllm_memory_leak'],
        'protocol': ['InferRequest', 'RequestConfig', 'Function', 'ChatCompletionResponse'],
    }

    import sys

    sys.modules[__name__] = _LazyModule(
        __name__,
        globals()['__file__'],
        _import_structure,
        module_spec=__spec__,
        extra_objects={},
    )

1	# Copyright (c) ModelScope Contributors. All rights reserved.
2	import os
3	import torch
4	from PIL import Image
5	from tqdm.asyncio import tqdm_asyncio
6	from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Union
7	
8	from swift.metrics import Metric
9	from swift.rlhf_trainers.utils import VLLM_LORA_INT_ID, VLLM_LORA_NAME, VLLM_LORA_PATH
10	from swift.template import Template
11	from .protocol import (ChatCompletionResponse, ChatCompletionResponseChoice, ChatMessage, InferRequest, RequestConfig,
12	                       RolloutOutput)
13	from .utils import AdapterRequest
14	from .vllm_engine import VllmEngine
15	
16	try:
17	    os.environ['VLLM_WORKER_MULTIPROC_METHOD'] = 'spawn'
18	    os.environ['VLLM_ENGINE_ITERATION_TIMEOUT_S'] = '86400'
19	    from vllm.lora.request import LoRARequest
20	except Exception:
21	    raise
22	
23	
24	class GRPOVllmEngine(VllmEngine):
25	
26	    def infer(
27	        self,
28	        infer_requests: List[Union[InferRequest, Dict[str, Any]]],
29	        request_config: Optional[RequestConfig] = None,
30	        metrics: Optional[List[Metric]] = None,
31	        *,
32	        use_tqdm: Optional[bool] = None,
33	        adapter_request: Optional[AdapterRequest] = None,
34	    ) -> List[RolloutOutput]:
35	        if not adapter_request and self.enable_lora:
36	            lora_loaded = VLLM_LORA_INT_ID in self.engine.list_loras()
37	            if lora_loaded:
38	                adapter_request = LoRARequest(
39	                    lora_name=VLLM_LORA_NAME, lora_int_id=VLLM_LORA_INT_ID, lora_path=VLLM_LORA_PATH)
40	
41	        res = super().infer(
42	            infer_requests,
43	            request_config,
44	            metrics,
45	            use_tqdm=use_tqdm,
46	            adapter_request=adapter_request,
47	        )
48	        if not isinstance(res, list):
49	            res = [res]
50	        for i, result in enumerate(res):
51	            if not isinstance(result, RolloutOutput):
52	                if not isinstance(result, ChatCompletionResponse):
53	                    raise TypeError('Result must be a ChatCompletionResponse or RolloutOutput instance.')
54	                res[i] = RolloutOutput(response=result)
55	
56	        return res
57	
58	    async def async_infer(self,
59	                          infer_requests: List[InferRequest],
60	                          request_config: Optional[RequestConfig] = None,
61	                          metrics: Optional[List[Metric]] = None,
62	                          *,
63	                          use_tqdm: Optional[bool] = None,
64	                          **kwargs) -> List[RolloutOutput]:
65	        if request_config is None:
66	            request_config = RequestConfig()
67	        assert request_config.n == 1
68	
69	        tasks = [self.infer_async(infer_request, request_config, **kwargs) for infer_request in infer_requests]
70	        if use_tqdm is None:
71	            use_tqdm = len(infer_requests) > 1
72	        res = await self._batch_infer_stream(tasks, request_config.stream, use_tqdm, metrics)
73	
74	        for i, result in enumerate(res):
75	            if not isinstance(result, RolloutOutput):
76	                if not isinstance(result, ChatCompletionResponse):
77	                    raise TypeError('Result must be a ChatCompletionResponse or RolloutOutput instance.')
78	                res[i] = RolloutOutput(response=result)
79	
80	        return res
81	
82	    async def _batch_infer_stream(self,
83	                                  tasks,
84	                                  stream: bool = True,
85	                                  use_tqdm: bool = True,
86	                                  metrics: Optional[List[Metric]] = None):
87	        assert not stream
88	        prog_bar = tqdm_asyncio(total=len(tasks), dynamic_ncols=True, disable=not use_tqdm)
89	
90	        async def _new_run(task):
91	            try:
92	                res = await task
93	            except Exception as e:
94	                if getattr(self, 'strict', True):
95	                    raise
96	                res = e
97	            prog_bar.update()
98	            self._update_metrics(res, metrics)
99	            return res
100	
101	        new_tasks = [_new_run(task) for task in tasks]
102	        return await self.batch_run(new_tasks)
103	
104	    def _create_chat_completion_response(self, result, inputs, request_config, request_id) -> ChatCompletionResponse:
105	        assert result is not None
106	        num_generated_tokens = sum(len(output.token_ids) for output in result.outputs)
107	        usage_info = self._get_usage_info(len(result.prompt_token_ids), num_generated_tokens)
108	        choices = []
109	        for output in result.outputs:
110	            output.token_ids = list(output.token_ids)
111	            response = self.template.decode_generate_ids(output.token_ids, template_inputs=inputs['template_inputs'])
112	            logprobs = self._get_logprobs(output.logprobs, output.token_ids, request_config.top_logprobs)
113	            toolcall = self._get_toolcall(response)
114	
115	            token_ids = output.token_ids if request_config.return_details else None
116	            choice = ChatCompletionResponseChoice(
117	                index=output.index,
118	                message=ChatMessage(role='assistant', content=response, tool_calls=toolcall),
119	                finish_reason=output.finish_reason,
120	                logprobs=logprobs,
121	                token_ids=token_ids,
122	                routed_experts=getattr(output, 'routed_experts', None))
123	            choices.append(choice)
124	        prompt_token_ids = None
125	        images_size = None
126	        if request_config.return_details:
127	            prompt_token_ids = result.prompt_token_ids
128	            images = inputs['template_inputs'].images
129	            if all(isinstance(image, Image.Image) for image in images):
130	                images_size = [image.size for image in images]
131	        return ChatCompletionResponse(
132	            model=self.model_name,
133	            choices=choices,
134	            usage=usage_info,
135	            id=request_id,
136	            prompt_token_ids=prompt_token_ids,
137	            images_size=images_size)
138	
139	    def _add_adapter(self, adapter_request: Optional[Union[AdapterRequest, LoRARequest]] = None):
140	        assert self.enable_lora, f'adapter_request: {adapter_request}, self.enable_lora: {self.enable_lora}'
141	        from vllm.lora.request import LoRARequest
142	        if isinstance(adapter_request, AdapterRequest):
143	            return super()._add_adapter(adapter_request)
144	        elif isinstance(adapter_request, LoRARequest):
145	            return adapter_request
146	        else:
147	            raise ValueError(f'Invalid adapter request: {adapter_request}')

# Copyright (c) ModelScope Contributors. All rights reserved.
import os
import torch
from PIL import Image
from tqdm.asyncio import tqdm_asyncio
from typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional, Union

from swift.metrics import Metric
from swift.rlhf_trainers.utils import VLLM_LORA_INT_ID, VLLM_LORA_NAME, VLLM_LORA_PATH
from swift.template import Template
from .protocol import (ChatCompletionResponse, ChatCompletionResponseChoice, ChatMessage, InferRequest, RequestConfig,
                       RolloutOutput)
from .utils import AdapterRequest
from .vllm_engine import VllmEngine

try:
    os.environ['VLLM_WORKER_MULTIPROC_METHOD'] = 'spawn'
    os.environ['VLLM_ENGINE_ITERATION_TIMEOUT_S'] = '86400'
    from vllm.lora.request import LoRARequest
except Exception:
    raise


class GRPOVllmEngine(VllmEngine):

    def infer(
        self,
        infer_requests: List[Union[InferRequest, Dict[str, Any]]],
        request_config: Optional[RequestConfig] = None,
        metrics: Optional[List[Metric]] = None,
        *,
        use_tqdm: Optional[bool] = None,
        adapter_request: Optional[AdapterRequest] = None,
    ) -> List[RolloutOutput]:
        if not adapter_request and self.enable_lora:
            lora_loaded = VLLM_LORA_INT_ID in self.engine.list_loras()
            if lora_loaded:
                adapter_request = LoRARequest(
                    lora_name=VLLM_LORA_NAME, lora_int_id=VLLM_LORA_INT_ID, lora_path=VLLM_LORA_PATH)

        res = super().infer(
            infer_requests,
            request_config,
            metrics,
            use_tqdm=use_tqdm,
            adapter_request=adapter_request,
        )
        if not isinstance(res, list):
            res = [res]
        for i, result in enumerate(res):
            if not isinstance(result, RolloutOutput):
                if not isinstance(result, ChatCompletionResponse):
                    raise TypeError('Result must be a ChatCompletionResponse or RolloutOutput instance.')
                res[i] = RolloutOutput(response=result)

        return res

    async def async_infer(self,
                          infer_requests: List[InferRequest],
                          request_config: Optional[RequestConfig] = None,
                          metrics: Optional[List[Metric]] = None,
                          *,
                          use_tqdm: Optional[bool] = None,
                          **kwargs) -> List[RolloutOutput]:
        if request_config is None:
            request_config = RequestConfig()
        assert request_config.n == 1

        tasks = [self.infer_async(infer_request, request_config, **kwargs) for infer_request in infer_requests]
        if use_tqdm is None:
            use_tqdm = len(infer_requests) > 1
        res = await self._batch_infer_stream(tasks, request_config.stream, use_tqdm, metrics)

        for i, result in enumerate(res):
            if not isinstance(result, RolloutOutput):
                if not isinstance(result, ChatCompletionResponse):
                    raise TypeError('Result must be a ChatCompletionResponse or RolloutOutput instance.')
                res[i] = RolloutOutput(response=result)

        return res

    async def _batch_infer_stream(self,
                                  tasks,
                                  stream: bool = True,
                                  use_tqdm: bool = True,
                                  metrics: Optional[List[Metric]] = None):
        assert not stream
        prog_bar = tqdm_asyncio(total=len(tasks), dynamic_ncols=True, disable=not use_tqdm)

        async def _new_run(task):
            try:
                res = await task
            except Exception as e:
                if getattr(self, 'strict', True):
                    raise
                res = e
            prog_bar.update()
            self._update_metrics(res, metrics)
            return res

        new_tasks = [_new_run(task) for task in tasks]
        return await self.batch_run(new_tasks)

    def _create_chat_completion_response(self, result, inputs, request_config, request_id) -> ChatCompletionResponse:
        assert result is not None
        num_generated_tokens = sum(len(output.token_ids) for output in result.outputs)
        usage_info = self._get_usage_info(len(result.prompt_token_ids), num_generated_tokens)
        choices = []
        for output in result.outputs:
            output.token_ids = list(output.token_ids)
            response = self.template.decode_generate_ids(output.token_ids, template_inputs=inputs['template_inputs'])
            logprobs = self._get_logprobs(output.logprobs, output.token_ids, request_config.top_logprobs)
            toolcall = self._get_toolcall(response)

            token_ids = output.token_ids if request_config.return_details else None
            choice = ChatCompletionResponseChoice(
                index=output.index,
                message=ChatMessage(role='assistant', content=response, tool_calls=toolcall),
                finish_reason=output.finish_reason,
                logprobs=logprobs,
                token_ids=token_ids,
                routed_experts=getattr(output, 'routed_experts', None))
            choices.append(choice)
        prompt_token_ids = None
        images_size = None
        if request_config.return_details:
            prompt_token_ids = result.prompt_token_ids
            images = inputs['template_inputs'].images
            if all(isinstance(image, Image.Image) for image in images):
                images_size = [image.size for image in images]
        return ChatCompletionResponse(
            model=self.model_name,
            choices=choices,
            usage=usage_info,
            id=request_id,
            prompt_token_ids=prompt_token_ids,
            images_size=images_size)

    def _add_adapter(self, adapter_request: Optional[Union[AdapterRequest, LoRARequest]] = None):
        assert self.enable_lora, f'adapter_request: {adapter_request}, self.enable_lora: {self.enable_lora}'
        from vllm.lora.request import LoRARequest
        if isinstance(adapter_request, AdapterRequest):
            return super()._add_adapter(adapter_request)
        elif isinstance(adapter_request, LoRARequest):
            return adapter_request
        else:
            raise ValueError(f'Invalid adapter request: {adapter_request}')

2	import numpy as np

4	from tqdm import tqdm

7	from swift.arguments import InferArguments

10	from swift.metrics import InferStats, MeanMetric, compute_rouge_bleu
11	from swift.utils import JsonlWriter, get_dist_setting, get_logger, is_dist, is_master, read_from_jsonl
12	from ..base import SwiftPipeline
13	from ..export import merge_lora
14	from ..utils import get_cached_dataset, prepare_model_template

17	logger = get_logger()
18

20	class SwiftInfer(SwiftPipeline):
21	    args_class = InferArguments
22	    args: args_class
23	
24	    def __init__(self, args: Optional[Union[List[str], InferArguments]] = None) -> None:
25	        super().__init__(args)
26	        args = self.args
27	        if args.merge_lora:
28	            merge_lora(args, device_map='cpu')
29	        self.infer_kwargs = {}
30	        if args.infer_backend == 'vllm' and args.adapters:
31	            self.infer_kwargs['adapter_request'] = AdapterRequest('_lora', args.adapters[0])
32	
33	        if args.infer_backend == 'transformers':
34	            model, self.template = prepare_model_template(args)
35	            self.infer_engine = TransformersEngine(model, template=self.template, max_batch_size=args.max_batch_size)
36	            logger.info(f'model: {self.infer_engine.model}')
37	        else:
38	            self.template = args.get_template()
39	            self.infer_engine = self.get_infer_engine(args, self.template)
40	        self.random_state = np.random.RandomState(args.data_seed)
41	
42	    def __getattr__(self, key: str):
43	        try:
44	            return super().__getattr__(key)
45	        except AttributeError:
46	            if 'infer_engine' in self.__dict__:
47	                return getattr(self.infer_engine, key)
48	            raise
49	
50	    @staticmethod
51	    def get_infer_engine(args: InferArguments, template=None, **extra_kwargs):
52	        infer_backend = extra_kwargs.pop('infer_backend', None) or args.infer_backend
53	        engine_kwargs = extra_kwargs.pop('engine_kwargs', {})
54	        kwargs = {
55	            'model_id_or_path': args.model,
56	            'model_type': args.model_type,
57	            'revision': args.model_revision,
58	            'torch_dtype': args.torch_dtype,
59	            'template': template,
60	        }
61	        if infer_backend in {'transformers', 'vllm'}:
62	            kwargs['reranker_use_activation'] = args.reranker_use_activation
63	        if infer_backend == 'transformers':
64	            infer_engine_cls = TransformersEngine
65	            kwargs.update(args.get_model_kwargs())
66	            if hasattr(args, 'max_batch_size'):
67	                kwargs.update({'max_batch_size': args.max_batch_size})
68	        elif infer_backend == 'vllm':
69	            from swift.infer_engine import VllmEngine
70	            infer_engine_cls = VllmEngine
71	            kwargs.update(args.get_vllm_engine_kwargs())
72	            seed = args.seed
73	            if is_dist():
74	                # Ensure that different data-parallel processes have different seeds.
75	                seed += get_dist_setting()[0] // args.vllm_tensor_parallel_size
76	                kwargs['distributed_executor_backend'] = 'external_launcher'
77	            kwargs['seed'] = seed
78	        elif infer_backend == 'sglang':
79	            from swift.infer_engine import SglangEngine
80	            infer_engine_cls = SglangEngine
81	            kwargs.update(args.get_sglang_engine_kwargs())
82	        elif infer_backend == 'lmdeploy':
83	            from swift.infer_engine import LmdeployEngine
84	            infer_engine_cls = LmdeployEngine
85	            kwargs.update(args.get_lmdeploy_engine_kwargs())
86	        else:
87	            raise ValueError(f'Inference backend `{infer_backend}` is not supported. '
88	                             'Please use one of: transformers, vllm, sglang, lmdeploy.')
89	        if engine_kwargs:
90	            kwargs['engine_kwargs'] = kwargs.get('engine_kwargs') or {}
91	            kwargs['engine_kwargs'].update(engine_kwargs)
92	        kwargs.update(extra_kwargs)
93	        return infer_engine_cls(**kwargs)
94	
95	    def run(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
96	        args = self.args
97	        self.jsonl_writer = JsonlWriter(args.result_path) if args.result_path else None
98	        if args.eval_human:
99	            result = self.infer_cli()
100	        else:
101	            result = self.infer_dataset()
102	        if args.result_path:
103	            logger.info(f'The inference results have been saved to result_path: `{args.result_path}`.')
104	        return result
105	
106	    @staticmethod
107	    def parse_data_from_response(response):
108	        if hasattr(response, 'choices'):
109	            return response.choices[0].message.content
110	        elif hasattr(response, 'data'):
111	            emb = response.data[0].embedding
112	            shape = len(emb)
113	            sample = str(emb)
114	            if len(emb) > 6:
115	                sample = str(emb[:3])[:-1] + ', ..., ' + str(emb[-3:])[1:]
116	            return f'Embedding(shape: [1, {shape}]): {sample}'
117	
118	    def infer_single(self, infer_request: Union[InferRequest, Dict[str, Any]], request_config: RequestConfig) -> str:
119	        res_or_gen = self.infer([infer_request], request_config, use_tqdm=False, **self.infer_kwargs)[0]
120	        if request_config and request_config.stream:
121	            response = ''
122	            for res in res_or_gen:
123	                delta = res.choices[0].delta.content
124	                print(delta, end='', flush=True)
125	                response += delta
126	            print()
127	        else:
128	            response = self.parse_data_from_response(res_or_gen)
129	            print(response)
130	        print('-' * 50)
131	        return response
132	
133	    def infer_cli(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
134	        args = self.args
135	        template = self.template
136	        request_config = args.get_request_config()
137	        logger.info(f'request_config: {request_config}')
138	
139	        logger.info('Input `exit` or `quit` to exit the conversation.')
140	        logger.info('Input `multi-line` to switch to multi-line input mode.')
141	        logger.info('Input `reset-system` to reset the system and clear the history.')
142	        support_multi_round = template.template_meta.support_multi_round
143	        if support_multi_round:
144	            logger.info('Input `clear` to clear the history.')
145	        else:
146	            logger.info('The current template only supports single-round dialogues.')
147	
148	        infer_state = InferCliState()
149	        result_list = []
150	        while True:
151	            if not support_multi_round:
152	                infer_state.clear()
153	            query = infer_state.input_text()
154	            if query.strip().lower() in {'exit', 'quit'}:
155	                break
156	            query = infer_state.check_query(query)
157	            if query is None:
158	                continue
159	            infer_state.add_query(query)
160	            if args.model_meta.is_multimodal:
161	                infer_state.input_mm_data()
162	            if args.model_meta.is_reward or args.task_type == 'prm':
163	                # reward model
164	                response = infer_state.input_text()
165	                infer_state.add_response(response)
166	                data = infer_state.to_dict()
167	                response = self.infer_single(data, request_config)
168	                data = {'response': response, **data}
169	            else:
170	                data = infer_state.to_dict()
171	                response = self.infer_single(data, request_config)
172	                infer_state.add_response(response)
173	                data['messages'].append({'role': 'assistant', 'content': response})
174	                data = {'response': response, **data}
175	            result_list.append(data)
176	            if self.jsonl_writer:
177	                self.jsonl_writer.append(data)
178	
179	        return result_list
180	
181	    def _prepare_val_dataset(self) -> HfDataset:
182	        args = self.args
183	        dataset_kwargs = args.get_dataset_kwargs()
184	        if args.cached_dataset or args.cached_val_dataset:
185	            _, val_datasets = get_cached_dataset(self.args)
186	        else:
187	            val_datasets = []
188	        if len(args.val_dataset) > 0:
189	            dataset_kwargs.pop('interleave_prob', None)
190	            _, val_dataset = load_dataset(
191	                args.val_dataset, split_dataset_ratio=1.0, shuffle=args.val_dataset_shuffle, **dataset_kwargs)
192	            val_datasets.append(val_dataset)
193	        elif args.dataset:
194	            _, val_dataset = load_dataset(
195	                args.dataset,
196	                split_dataset_ratio=args.split_dataset_ratio,
197	                shuffle=args.dataset_shuffle,
198	                **dataset_kwargs)
199	            val_datasets.append(val_dataset)
200	        assert len(val_datasets) > 0
201	        val_dataset = DatasetLoader.concat_datasets(val_datasets)
202	        val_dataset = sample_dataset(val_dataset, args.val_dataset_sample, args.dataset_shuffle, self.random_state)
203	        return val_dataset
204	
205	    def _calc_metric(self):
206	        args = self.args
207	        if not is_master():
208	            return
209	        data_list = read_from_jsonl(self.jsonl_writer.fpath)
210	        preds, labels = [], []
211	        for data in data_list:
212	            preds.append(data['response'])
213	            labels.append(data['labels'])
214	        if args.metric == 'acc':
215	            mean_metric = MeanMetric()
216	            for pred, label in zip(preds, labels):
217	                mean_metric.update(pred == label)
218	            res = {'acc': mean_metric.compute()['value']}
219	        elif args.metric == 'rouge':
220	            res = compute_rouge_bleu(preds, labels)
221	        logger.info(res)
222	
223	    def infer_dataset(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
224	        args = self.args
225	        request_config = args.get_request_config()
226	        logger.info(f'request_config: {request_config}')
227	
228	        val_dataset = self._prepare_val_dataset()
229	        logger.info(f'val_dataset: {val_dataset}')
230	
231	        self.infer_kwargs['metrics'] = [InferStats()]
232	        if request_config and request_config.stream:
233	            result_list = []
234	            for data in val_dataset:
235	                labels = InferRequest.remove_response(data['messages'])
236	                query = data['messages'][-1]['content']
237	                print(f'[QUERY] {query}')
238	                if labels:
239	                    print(f'[LABELS] {labels}')
240	                print('[RESPONSE] ', end='')
241	                response = self.infer_single(data, request_config)
242	                data['messages'].append({'role': 'assistant', 'content': response})
243	                data = {'response': response, 'labels': labels, **data}
244	                result_list.append(data)
245	                if self.jsonl_writer:
246	                    self.jsonl_writer.append(data)
247	            metrics = self.infer_kwargs.pop('metrics')
248	            print(metrics[0].compute())
249	        else:
250	            if args.write_batch_size <= 0:
251	                args.write_batch_size = len(val_dataset)
252	            if args.write_batch_size < len(val_dataset) and args.result_path:
253	                logger.info(f'args.result_path: {args.result_path}')
254	            prog_bar = tqdm(
255	                total=len(val_dataset), dynamic_ncols=True, disable=args.write_batch_size >= len(val_dataset))
256	            result_list = []
257	            idx = 0
258	            while idx < len(val_dataset):
259	                shard_size = min(args.write_batch_size, len(val_dataset) - idx)
260	                shard_dataset = val_dataset.select(range(idx, idx + shard_size))
261	                result = self._batch_infer(shard_dataset, request_config)
262	                if self.jsonl_writer:
263	                    self.jsonl_writer.append(result, gather_obj=True)
264	                result_list += result
265	                idx += shard_size
266	                prog_bar.update(shard_size)
267	            prog_bar.close()
268	            metrics = self.infer_kwargs.pop('metrics')
269	            if result_list:
270	                metric = metrics[0].compute()
271	                print(f'[rank{args.rank}] {metric}' if args.rank >= 0 else str(metric))
272	        if args.metric is not None:
273	            self._calc_metric()
274	        return result_list
275	
276	    def _batch_infer(self, val_dataset, request_config):
277	        args = self.args
278	        result_list = []
279	        if args.infer_backend == 'vllm':
280	            rank = args.rank // args.vllm_tensor_parallel_size if args.rank >= 0 else -1
281	            data_parallel_size = args.global_world_size // args.vllm_tensor_parallel_size
282	        else:
283	            rank, data_parallel_size = args.rank, args.global_world_size
284	        # The dataset is insufficient for DP partitioning
285	        if len(val_dataset) < data_parallel_size:
286	            if rank >= len(val_dataset):
287	                return []
288	            data_parallel_size = len(val_dataset)
289	        if rank >= 0 and data_parallel_size > 1:
290	            val_dataset = val_dataset.shard(data_parallel_size, rank, contiguous=True)
291	        val_dataset = list(val_dataset)
292	        labels_list = []
293	        for data in val_dataset:
294	            if args.task_type == 'causal_lm':
295	                labels = InferRequest.remove_response(data['messages'])
296	            else:
297	                labels = data.pop('label', None)
298	            labels_list.append(labels)
299	
300	        resp_list = self.infer(val_dataset, request_config, use_tqdm=True, **self.infer_kwargs)
301	        if not (args.infer_backend == 'vllm' and rank >= 0
302	                and args.rank % args.vllm_tensor_parallel_size != 0):  # DP & TP
303	            for data, resp, labels in zip(val_dataset, resp_list, labels_list):
304	                response = resp.choices[0].message.content
305	                data['messages'].append({'role': 'assistant', 'content': response})
306	                data = {'response': response, 'labels': labels, 'logprobs': resp.choices[0].logprobs, **data}
307	                result_list.append(data)
308	        return result_list
309	
310	
311	def infer_main(args: Optional[Union[List[str], InferArguments]] = None):
312	    return SwiftInfer(args).main()

16	@dataclass
17	class LmdeployArguments:
18	    """Holds the configuration arguments for lmdeploy.
19	
20	    Args:
21	        lmdeploy_tp (int): The tensor parallelism size. Defaults to 1.
22	        lmdeploy_session_len (Optional[int]): The maximum session length. Defaults to None.
23	        lmdeploy_cache_max_entry_count (float): The percentage of GPU memory to be used by the K/V cache. Defaults
24	            to 0.8.
25	        lmdeploy_quant_policy (int): The quantization policy for the K/V cache. Set to 4 or 8 for 4-bit or 8-bit
26	            quantization respectively. Defaults to 0, which means no quantization.
27	        lmdeploy_vision_batch_size (int): The `max_batch_size` parameter to be passed to `VisionConfig`. Defaults to 1.
28	    """
29	
30	    # lmdeploy
31	    lmdeploy_tp: int = 1
32	    lmdeploy_session_len: Optional[int] = None
33	    lmdeploy_cache_max_entry_count: float = 0.8
34	    lmdeploy_quant_policy: int = 0  # e.g. 4, 8
35	    lmdeploy_vision_batch_size: int = 1  # max_batch_size in VisionConfig
36	
37	    def get_lmdeploy_engine_kwargs(self):
38	        kwargs = {
39	            'tp': self.lmdeploy_tp,
40	            'session_len': self.lmdeploy_session_len,
41	            'cache_max_entry_count': self.lmdeploy_cache_max_entry_count,
42	            'quant_policy': self.lmdeploy_quant_policy,
43	            'vision_batch_size': self.lmdeploy_vision_batch_size
44	        }
45	        if dist.is_initialized():
46	            kwargs.update({'devices': [dist.get_rank()]})
47	        return kwargs

49	
50	@dataclass
51	class SglangArguments:
52	    """Arguments for configuring the SGLang backend.
53	
54	    Args:
55	        sglang_tp_size (int): The number of tensor parallel workers. Defaults to 1.
56	        sglang_pp_size (int): The number of pipeline parallel workers. Defaults to 1.
57	        sglang_dp_size (int): The number of data parallel workers. Defaults to 1.
58	        sglang_ep_size (int): The number of expert parallel workers. Defaults to 1.
59	        sglang_enable_ep_moe (bool): Whether to enable expert parallelism for MoE.
60	            Note: This argument has been removed in recent versions of SGLang. Defaults to False.
61	        sglang_mem_fraction_static (Optional[float]): The fraction of GPU memory for the static allocation of model
62	            weights and the KV cache memory pool. Try lowering this value if you encounter GPU out-of-memory errors.
63	            Defaults to None.
64	        sglang_context_length (Optional[int]): The maximum context length for the model. If None, the value from the
65	            model's `config.json` will be used. Defaults to None.
66	        sglang_disable_cuda_graph (bool): Disable CUDA graph for inference. Defaults to False.
67	        sglang_quantization (Optional[str]): The quantization method to use. Defaults to None.
68	        sglang_kv_cache_dtype (str): The data type for K/V cache storage. 'auto' will use the model's data type.
69	            'fp8_e5m2' and 'fp8_e4m3' are available for CUDA 11.8 and later. Defaults to 'auto'.
70	        sglang_enable_dp_attention (bool): Enables data parallelism for the attention mechanism and tensor parallelism
71	            for the feed-forward network (FFN). The data parallel size (dp_size) must equal the tensor parallel size
72	            (tp_size). Currently supported for DeepSeek-V2/3 and Qwen2/3 MoE models. Defaults to False.
73	        sglang_disable_custom_all_reduce (bool): Disable the custom all-reduce kernel and fall back to NCCL. Enabled by
74	            default (True) for stability. Defaults to True.
75	        sglang_speculative_algorithm (Optional[str]): The speculative decoding algorithm. Options include "EAGLE",
76	            "EAGLE3", "NEXTN", "STANDALONE", "NGRAM". Defaults to None.
77	        sglang_speculative_num_steps (Optional[int]): The number of steps to sample from the draft model during
78	            speculative decoding. Defaults to None.
79	        sglang_speculative_eagle_topk (Optional[int]): The number of tokens to sample from the draft model at each step
80	            for the EAGLE2 algorithm. Defaults to None.
81	        sglang_speculative_num_draft_tokens (Optional[int]): The number of tokens to sample from the draft model during
82	            speculative decoding. Defaults to None.
83	    """
84	    sglang_tp_size: int = 1
85	    sglang_pp_size: int = 1
86	    sglang_dp_size: int = 1
87	    sglang_ep_size: int = 1
88	    sglang_enable_ep_moe: bool = False
89	    sglang_mem_fraction_static: Optional[float] = None

91	    sglang_disable_cuda_graph: bool = False

116	            'disable_custom_all_reduce': self.sglang_disable_custom_all_reduce,
117	            'speculative_algorithm': self.sglang_speculative_algorithm,

119	            'speculative_eagle_topk': self.sglang_speculative_eagle_topk,

121	        }
122	        if self.task_type == 'embedding':

128	class InferArguments(MergeArguments, LmdeployArguments, SglangArguments, VllmArguments, BaseArguments):
129	    """Arguments for model inference.
130	
131	    A dataclass that extends BaseArguments, MergeArguments, VllmArguments, and LmdeployArguments to define all
132	    arguments required for model inference.

134	    Args:
135	        infer_backend (Literal['transformers', 'vllm', 'sglang', 'lmdeploy']): The inference acceleration
136	            backend to use. Defaults to 'transformers'.
137	        result_path (Optional[str]): The path to store inference results in JSONL format. If the file already exists,
138	            new results will be appended. If None, results are saved in the checkpoint directory (if available) or
139	            './result'. The final path will be printed to the console. Defaults to None.
140	        write_batch_size (int): The batch size for writing results to `result_path`. A value of -1 means no limit.
141	            Defaults to 1000.
142	        metric (Optional[str]): The metric to use for evaluating inference results. Supported values are 'acc' and
143	            'rouge'. If None, no evaluation is performed. Defaults to None.
144	        max_batch_size (int): The maximum batch size for inference, effective only when `infer_backend` is
145	            'transformers'. A value of -1 means no limit. Defaults to 1.
146	        val_dataset_sample (Optional[int]): The number of samples to use from the inference dataset. If None, the
147	            entire dataset is used. Defaults to None.
148	        reranker_use_activation (bool): Whether to apply a sigmoid activation to the scores during reranker inference.
149	            Defaults to True.
150	    """
151	    # `pt` is used for swift3.x shell script compatibility.
152	    infer_backend: Literal['vllm', 'transformers', 'sglang', 'lmdeploy', 'pt'] = 'transformers'
153	
154	    result_path: Optional[str] = None
155	    write_batch_size: int = 1000
156	    metric: Literal['acc', 'rouge'] = None
157	    # for transformers engine
158	    max_batch_size: int = 1
159	
160	    # only for inference
161	    val_dataset_sample: Optional[int] = None
162	
163	    # for reranker
164	    reranker_use_activation: bool = True
165	
166	    def _get_result_path(self, folder_name: str) -> str:
167	        result_dir = self.ckpt_dir or f'result/{self.model_suffix}'
168	        os.makedirs(result_dir, exist_ok=True)
169	        result_dir = to_abspath(os.path.join(result_dir, folder_name))
170	        os.makedirs(result_dir, exist_ok=True)
171	        time = dt.datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
172	        return os.path.join(result_dir, f'{time}.jsonl')
173	
174	    def _init_result_path(self, folder_name: str) -> None:
175	        if self.result_path is not None:
176	            self.result_path = to_abspath(self.result_path)
177	            return
178	        # By default, a result_path file is automatically created
179	        # when a validation or evaluation dataset is present.
180	        if self._val_dataset_exists or getattr(self, 'eval_dataset', None):
181	            self.result_path = self._get_result_path(folder_name)
182	            logger.info(f'args.result_path: {self.result_path}')
183	
184	    def _init_stream(self):
185	        self.eval_human = not self._val_dataset_exists
186	        logger.info(f'Setting args.eval_human: {self.eval_human}')
187	        if self.stream is None:
188	            self.stream = self.eval_human
189	        if self.stream and self.num_beams != 1:
190	            self.stream = False
191	            logger.info('Setting args.stream: False')
192

194	        if not is_dist():
195	            return
196	        eval_human = getattr(self, 'eval_human', False)
197	        assert not eval_human and not self.stream, (
198	            'In DDP scenarios, interactive interfaces and streaming output are not supported.'
199	            f'args.eval_human: {eval_human}, args.stream: {self.stream}')
200	        self._init_device()
201	        init_process_group(backend=self.ddp_backend, timeout=self.ddp_timeout)
202	
203	    def __post_init__(self) -> None:
204	        if self.infer_backend == 'pt':
205	            self.infer_backend = 'transformers'  # compat swift3.x
206	            logger.warning('args.infer_backend: `pt` is deprecated, please use args.infer_backend: `transformers`.')
207	        BaseArguments.__post_init__(self)
208	        VllmArguments.__post_init__(self)
209	        self._init_vllm_async_engine()
210	        # Default to False for swift infer (non-encode tasks)
211	        if self.vllm_use_async_engine is None:
212	            self.vllm_use_async_engine = False
213	        self._init_result_path('infer_result')
214	        self._init_ddp()
215	
216	    def _init_vllm_async_engine(self):
217	        """Initialize vllm_use_async_engine based on task_type.
218	
219	        Encode tasks (embedding, seq_cls, reranker, generative_reranker) require
220	        async engine because vLLM's synchronous LLMEngine does not have the `encode` method.
221	
222	        Note: This method only handles encode tasks. For non-encode tasks, the default value
223	        should be set by subclasses (DeployArguments sets True, RolloutArguments uses
224	        _set_default_engine_type, InferArguments defaults to False).
225	        """
226	        # Task types that require vLLM's encode() method, which is only available in AsyncLLMEngine
227	        encode_task_types = ('embedding', 'seq_cls', 'reranker', 'generative_reranker')
228	        is_vllm_encode_task = self.infer_backend == 'vllm' and self.task_type in encode_task_types
229	
230	        if is_vllm_encode_task:
231	            if self.vllm_use_async_engine is None:
232	                self.vllm_use_async_engine = True
233	            elif not self.vllm_use_async_engine:
234	                raise ValueError(
235	                    f'task_type={self.task_type} requires vllm_use_async_engine=True. '
236	                    f'The synchronous vLLM LLMEngine does not support the `encode` method for encode tasks. '
237	                    f'Please set --vllm_use_async_engine true or remove the explicit false setting.')

# Copyright (c) ModelScope Contributors. All rights reserved.
import datetime as dt
import os
import torch.distributed as dist
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Literal, Optional

from swift.rlhf_trainers import VllmArguments
from swift.utils import get_logger, init_process_group, is_dist, to_abspath
from .base_args import BaseArguments
from .merge_args import MergeArguments

logger = get_logger()


@dataclass
class LmdeployArguments:
    """Holds the configuration arguments for lmdeploy.

    Args:
        lmdeploy_tp (int): The tensor parallelism size. Defaults to 1.
        lmdeploy_session_len (Optional[int]): The maximum session length. Defaults to None.
        lmdeploy_cache_max_entry_count (float): The percentage of GPU memory to be used by the K/V cache. Defaults
            to 0.8.
        lmdeploy_quant_policy (int): The quantization policy for the K/V cache. Set to 4 or 8 for 4-bit or 8-bit
            quantization respectively. Defaults to 0, which means no quantization.
        lmdeploy_vision_batch_size (int): The `max_batch_size` parameter to be passed to `VisionConfig`. Defaults to 1.
    """

    # lmdeploy
    lmdeploy_tp: int = 1
    lmdeploy_session_len: Optional[int] = None
    lmdeploy_cache_max_entry_count: float = 0.8
    lmdeploy_quant_policy: int = 0  # e.g. 4, 8
    lmdeploy_vision_batch_size: int = 1  # max_batch_size in VisionConfig

    def get_lmdeploy_engine_kwargs(self):
        kwargs = {
            'tp': self.lmdeploy_tp,
            'session_len': self.lmdeploy_session_len,
            'cache_max_entry_count': self.lmdeploy_cache_max_entry_count,
            'quant_policy': self.lmdeploy_quant_policy,
            'vision_batch_size': self.lmdeploy_vision_batch_size
        }
        if dist.is_initialized():
            kwargs.update({'devices': [dist.get_rank()]})
        return kwargs


@dataclass
class SglangArguments:
    """Arguments for configuring the SGLang backend.

    Args:
        sglang_tp_size (int): The number of tensor parallel workers. Defaults to 1.
        sglang_pp_size (int): The number of pipeline parallel workers. Defaults to 1.
        sglang_dp_size (int): The number of data parallel workers. Defaults to 1.
        sglang_ep_size (int): The number of expert parallel workers. Defaults to 1.
        sglang_enable_ep_moe (bool): Whether to enable expert parallelism for MoE.
            Note: This argument has been removed in recent versions of SGLang. Defaults to False.
        sglang_mem_fraction_static (Optional[float]): The fraction of GPU memory for the static allocation of model
            weights and the KV cache memory pool. Try lowering this value if you encounter GPU out-of-memory errors.
            Defaults to None.
        sglang_context_length (Optional[int]): The maximum context length for the model. If None, the value from the
            model's `config.json` will be used. Defaults to None.
        sglang_disable_cuda_graph (bool): Disable CUDA graph for inference. Defaults to False.
        sglang_quantization (Optional[str]): The quantization method to use. Defaults to None.
        sglang_kv_cache_dtype (str): The data type for K/V cache storage. 'auto' will use the model's data type.
            'fp8_e5m2' and 'fp8_e4m3' are available for CUDA 11.8 and later. Defaults to 'auto'.
        sglang_enable_dp_attention (bool): Enables data parallelism for the attention mechanism and tensor parallelism
            for the feed-forward network (FFN). The data parallel size (dp_size) must equal the tensor parallel size
            (tp_size). Currently supported for DeepSeek-V2/3 and Qwen2/3 MoE models. Defaults to False.
        sglang_disable_custom_all_reduce (bool): Disable the custom all-reduce kernel and fall back to NCCL. Enabled by
            default (True) for stability. Defaults to True.
        sglang_speculative_algorithm (Optional[str]): The speculative decoding algorithm. Options include "EAGLE",
            "EAGLE3", "NEXTN", "STANDALONE", "NGRAM". Defaults to None.
        sglang_speculative_num_steps (Optional[int]): The number of steps to sample from the draft model during
            speculative decoding. Defaults to None.
        sglang_speculative_eagle_topk (Optional[int]): The number of tokens to sample from the draft model at each step
            for the EAGLE2 algorithm. Defaults to None.
        sglang_speculative_num_draft_tokens (Optional[int]): The number of tokens to sample from the draft model during
            speculative decoding. Defaults to None.
    """
    sglang_tp_size: int = 1
    sglang_pp_size: int = 1
    sglang_dp_size: int = 1
    sglang_ep_size: int = 1
    sglang_enable_ep_moe: bool = False
    sglang_mem_fraction_static: Optional[float] = None
    sglang_context_length: Optional[int] = None
    sglang_disable_cuda_graph: bool = False
    sglang_quantization: Optional[str] = None
    sglang_kv_cache_dtype: str = 'auto'
    sglang_enable_dp_attention: bool = False
    sglang_disable_custom_all_reduce: bool = True
    # speculative decoding
    # e.g. EAGLE, EAGLE3, NEXTN
    sglang_speculative_algorithm: Optional[str] = None
    sglang_speculative_num_steps: Optional[int] = None
    sglang_speculative_eagle_topk: Optional[int] = None
    sglang_speculative_num_draft_tokens: Optional[int] = None

    def get_sglang_engine_kwargs(self):
        kwargs = {
            'tp_size': self.sglang_tp_size,
            'pp_size': self.sglang_pp_size,
            'dp_size': self.sglang_dp_size,
            'ep_size': self.sglang_ep_size,
            'enable_ep_moe': self.sglang_enable_ep_moe,
            'mem_fraction_static': self.sglang_mem_fraction_static,
            'context_length': self.sglang_context_length,
            'disable_cuda_graph': self.sglang_disable_cuda_graph,
            'quantization': self.sglang_quantization,
            'kv_cache_dtype': self.sglang_kv_cache_dtype,
            'enable_dp_attention': self.sglang_enable_dp_attention,
            'disable_custom_all_reduce': self.sglang_disable_custom_all_reduce,
            'speculative_algorithm': self.sglang_speculative_algorithm,
            'speculative_num_steps': self.sglang_speculative_num_steps,
            'speculative_eagle_topk': self.sglang_speculative_eagle_topk,
            'speculative_num_draft_tokens': self.sglang_speculative_num_draft_tokens,
        }
        if self.task_type == 'embedding':
            kwargs['task_type'] = 'embedding'
        return kwargs


@dataclass
class InferArguments(MergeArguments, LmdeployArguments, SglangArguments, VllmArguments, BaseArguments):
    """Arguments for model inference.

    A dataclass that extends BaseArguments, MergeArguments, VllmArguments, and LmdeployArguments to define all
    arguments required for model inference.

    Args:
        infer_backend (Literal['transformers', 'vllm', 'sglang', 'lmdeploy']): The inference acceleration
            backend to use. Defaults to 'transformers'.
        result_path (Optional[str]): The path to store inference results in JSONL format. If the file already exists,
            new results will be appended. If None, results are saved in the checkpoint directory (if available) or
            './result'. The final path will be printed to the console. Defaults to None.
        write_batch_size (int): The batch size for writing results to `result_path`. A value of -1 means no limit.
            Defaults to 1000.
        metric (Optional[str]): The metric to use for evaluating inference results. Supported values are 'acc' and
            'rouge'. If None, no evaluation is performed. Defaults to None.
        max_batch_size (int): The maximum batch size for inference, effective only when `infer_backend` is
            'transformers'. A value of -1 means no limit. Defaults to 1.
        val_dataset_sample (Optional[int]): The number of samples to use from the inference dataset. If None, the
            entire dataset is used. Defaults to None.
        reranker_use_activation (bool): Whether to apply a sigmoid activation to the scores during reranker inference.
            Defaults to True.
    """
    # `pt` is used for swift3.x shell script compatibility.
    infer_backend: Literal['vllm', 'transformers', 'sglang', 'lmdeploy', 'pt'] = 'transformers'

    result_path: Optional[str] = None
    write_batch_size: int = 1000
    metric: Literal['acc', 'rouge'] = None
    # for transformers engine
    max_batch_size: int = 1

    # only for inference
    val_dataset_sample: Optional[int] = None

    # for reranker
    reranker_use_activation: bool = True

    def _get_result_path(self, folder_name: str) -> str:
        result_dir = self.ckpt_dir or f'result/{self.model_suffix}'
        os.makedirs(result_dir, exist_ok=True)
        result_dir = to_abspath(os.path.join(result_dir, folder_name))
        os.makedirs(result_dir, exist_ok=True)
        time = dt.datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
        return os.path.join(result_dir, f'{time}.jsonl')

    def _init_result_path(self, folder_name: str) -> None:
        if self.result_path is not None:
            self.result_path = to_abspath(self.result_path)
            return
        # By default, a result_path file is automatically created
        # when a validation or evaluation dataset is present.
        if self._val_dataset_exists or getattr(self, 'eval_dataset', None):
            self.result_path = self._get_result_path(folder_name)
            logger.info(f'args.result_path: {self.result_path}')

    def _init_stream(self):
        self.eval_human = not self._val_dataset_exists
        logger.info(f'Setting args.eval_human: {self.eval_human}')
        if self.stream is None:
            self.stream = self.eval_human
        if self.stream and self.num_beams != 1:
            self.stream = False
            logger.info('Setting args.stream: False')

    def _init_ddp(self):
        if not is_dist():
            return
        eval_human = getattr(self, 'eval_human', False)
        assert not eval_human and not self.stream, (
            'In DDP scenarios, interactive interfaces and streaming output are not supported.'
            f'args.eval_human: {eval_human}, args.stream: {self.stream}')
        self._init_device()
        init_process_group(backend=self.ddp_backend, timeout=self.ddp_timeout)

    def __post_init__(self) -> None:
        if self.infer_backend == 'pt':
            self.infer_backend = 'transformers'  # compat swift3.x
            logger.warning('args.infer_backend: `pt` is deprecated, please use args.infer_backend: `transformers`.')
        BaseArguments.__post_init__(self)
        VllmArguments.__post_init__(self)
        self._init_vllm_async_engine()
        # Default to False for swift infer (non-encode tasks)
        if self.vllm_use_async_engine is None:
            self.vllm_use_async_engine = False
        self._init_result_path('infer_result')
        self._init_ddp()

    def _init_vllm_async_engine(self):
        """Initialize vllm_use_async_engine based on task_type.

        Encode tasks (embedding, seq_cls, reranker, generative_reranker) require
        async engine because vLLM's synchronous LLMEngine does not have the `encode` method.

        Note: This method only handles encode tasks. For non-encode tasks, the default value
        should be set by subclasses (DeployArguments sets True, RolloutArguments uses
        _set_default_engine_type, InferArguments defaults to False).
        """
        # Task types that require vLLM's encode() method, which is only available in AsyncLLMEngine
        encode_task_types = ('embedding', 'seq_cls', 'reranker', 'generative_reranker')
        is_vllm_encode_task = self.infer_backend == 'vllm' and self.task_type in encode_task_types

        if is_vllm_encode_task:
            if self.vllm_use_async_engine is None:
                self.vllm_use_async_engine = True
            elif not self.vllm_use_async_engine:
                raise ValueError(
                    f'task_type={self.task_type} requires vllm_use_async_engine=True. '
                    f'The synchronous vLLM LLMEngine does not support the `encode` method for encode tasks. '
                    f'Please set --vllm_use_async_engine true or remove the explicit false setting.')

38	class LmdeployEngine(InferEngine):
39	
40	    def __init__(
41	        self,

43	        *,
44	        template: Optional[Template] = None,
45	        torch_dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,
46	        model_type: Optional[str] = None,
47	        template_type: Optional[str] = None,

55	        quant_policy: int = 0,  # e.g. 4, 8
56	        vision_batch_size: int = 1,  # max_batch_size in VisionConfig
57	        engine_kwargs: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,

61	        self.torch_dtype = torch_dtype
62	        self.model_type = model_type

69	        self.quant_policy = quant_policy
70	        self.vision_batch_size = vision_batch_size
71	        self.devices = devices
72	        if template is None:
73	            processor = self._get_processor()
74	            template = self._get_template(processor, template_type=template_type)
75	        else:
76	            safe_snapshot_download(
77	                model_id_or_path,
78	                revision=revision,
79	                download_model=True,
80	                use_hf=use_hf,
81	                ignore_patterns=getattr(template.model_meta, 'ignore_patterns', None),
82	                hub_token=hub_token)
83	        super().__init__(template)
84	
85	        if self.max_model_len is not None:
86	            self.max_model_len -= 1
87	        self._prepare_engine_kwargs(engine_kwargs)
88	        self.config.torch_dtype = self.torch_dtype = self.torch_dtype or self.model_info.torch_dtype
89	        self._prepare_engine()
90	        self._load_generation_config()
91	
92	    def _get_processor(self):
93	        return get_processor(
94	            model_id_or_path=self.model_id_or_path,
95	            torch_dtype=self.torch_dtype,
96	            download_model=True,
97	            model_type=self.model_type,
98	            use_hf=self.use_hf,
99	            hub_token=self.hub_token,
100	            revision=self.revision)
101	
102	    def _prepare_engine_kwargs(self, engine_kwargs):
103	        if engine_kwargs is None:
104	            engine_kwargs = {}
105	        engine_kwargs['tp'] = self.tp
106	        engine_kwargs['session_len'] = self.session_len

108	        engine_kwargs['quant_policy'] = self.quant_policy
109	        if 'devices' in inspect.signature(TurbomindEngineConfig).parameters:

121	                'multimodal models in lmdeploy>=0.9.')

265	        logprobs = self._get_logprobs(output.logprobs, output.token_ids, request_config.top_logprobs)

272	        choices = [

284	            images = inputs['template_inputs'].images

286	                images_size = [image.size for image in images]
287	        return ChatCompletionResponse(
288	            model=self.model_name,
289	            choices=choices,

293	
294	    async def infer_async(self,
295	                          infer_request: InferRequest,
296	                          request_config: Optional[RequestConfig] = None,
297	                          *,
298	                          pre_infer_hook=None,
299	                          **kwargs) -> Union[ChatCompletionResponse, AsyncIterator[ChatCompletionStreamResponse]]:
300	        request_config = deepcopy(request_config or RequestConfig())
301	        self.template.set_mode('lmdeploy')

309	                messages = self.engine._convert_prompts(('', images))

312	                if self.engine.backend == 'turbomind':
313	                    results = await self.engine.vl_encoder.async_infer(results)

319	            else:

321	                await self.template.prepare_lmdeploy_turbomind_inputs(inputs)

327	        if pre_infer_hook:

334	    def _batch_infer_stream(self, *args, **kwargs):

336	            self.engine.vl_encoder._loop_task = None
337	        if hasattr(self.engine, 'free_insts'):

350	        return super().infer(infer_requests, request_config, metrics, use_tqdm=use_tqdm, **kwargs)
351
